candidate.objective: Dedicated and competent Poly Welder with experience in HDPE pipeline installation, fabrication, and civil construction across Western Australian mining and resources projects. Kyle has developed strong technical skills in poly welding, civil earthworks, and bore installation through roles with ACM Resources, UON, and DAMOS. He demonstrates a consistent focus on safety, quality standards, and effective teamwork, and holds inductions for FMG and Roy Hill operations.

duties: Installation of HDPE pipelines across mining and resources sector projects.
Fabrication of HDPE spools for pipeline systems.
Civil works associated with the installation of HDPE pipelines.
Repairs to existing pipelines and associated infrastructure.
Welded HDPE pipelines in accordance with project scope including bolt-ups and final installations.
Developed skills and experience in assisting trench crews, civil works, and road construction, as well as general trade assistant duties.
Assisted in multiple bore installations for dewatering of mining pits.
Maintained job safety standards including safe area set-ups, clear communications, job planning, and critical thinking.
Read and interpreted construction drawings to ensure accurate pipeline installation.
Welded pipe and pipe fittings to a high standard using correct welding parameters.
Applied formulas and general mathematics to calculate welding measures for quality assurance.
Performed general labour duties and operated a variety of hand and power tools.
Adhered to OH&S guidelines and maintained housekeeping standards on site.

skills.detail: Experienced in the installation and fabrication of HDPE pipelines including butt fusion welding, spool fabrication, bolt-ups, and pipeline repairs across mining and civil construction environments.
Capable of supporting trench crews, road and access construction, bore installation, and general civil works associated with pipeline projects.
Competent in reading and interpreting construction drawings and applying engineering data to welding parameters.
Demonstrated commitment to OH&S compliance, safe area set-ups, and worksite housekeeping standards.

certifications.details: Competency in HDPE poly welding including butt fusion techniques for pipeline installation and fabrication.
Certified for elevated work platform operation.
Dogging licence for slinging and directing loads.
Certified for chainsaw operation and maintenance.
General Construction Induction card — national white card.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
